action.reasoning: Observation: test balanced accuracy improved to 0.602 with DANN (val BA 0.858). However, still large domain gap, rare classes (squirrel 0.09, bird 0.31) weak. Analysis: DANN helps but not enough; model overfits source domain distribution. Decision: Add SWAD (stochastic weight averaging across late epochs in high-BA valley), focal loss for hard examples, stronger augmentation (RandAugment magnitude 12, ColorJitter, grayscale), and increase dropout to 0.4. Keep CLIP ViT-B/16 backbone (proven). Train 40 epochs with early stopping. This should improve generalization without doubling model size.
